pr.title: fix: MCP settings wont update
pr.body:
<!-- Keep this PR as draft until it is ready for review. -->

<!-- AI/LLM agents: be concise and specific. Do not check the box below. -->

- [x] A human has tested these changes.

---

## Why

<!-- Describe problem, motivation, etc.-->
Users cannot update or delete MCP server settings in OpenHands Cloud. Clicking save or delete buttons has no effect.


## Summary

<!-- 1-3 bullets describing what changed. -->
1. Backend: Replace `mcp_config` and `acp_env` instead using `deep merge` to prevent deleted items from being resurrected
2. Frontend: Fetch fresh settings at mutation time in MCP hooks to avoid stale settings at render time instead of mutation time
3. Frontend: Persist server names through `parseMcpConfig` ã `toSdkMcpConfig`. 

## Issue Number
<!-- Required if there is a relevant issue to this PR. -->

## How to Test

<!--
Required. Share the steps for the reviewer to be able to test your PR. e.g. You can test by running `npm install` then `npm build dev`.

If you could not test this, say why.
-->
1. Settings ã MCP 
2. Add & update MCP servers and save


<!--
Provide a video or screenshots of testing your PR. e.g. you added a new feature to the gui, show us the video of you testing it successfully.

-->
